item.arguments: Use $flywheel:browser-test on a checkout flow that just changed visually and behaviorally.
success_definition: Hands the result into review or ship.

item.arguments: Use $flywheel:browser-test on a login flow, but playwright-cli is not installed on this machine.
success_definition: Routes setup through /flywheel:setup browser or equivalent.
Does not pretend browser proof happened.

item.arguments: Use $flywheel:browser-test on a payment settings page where screenshots and logs may expose tokens or cookies.
Use $flywheel:browser-test on a browser-visible checkout change where the proof should be reused during shipping.
special_constraints: Shared evidence should stay small and local-first.
success_definition: Mentions a shared evidence bundle or summary.
Keeps raw browser artifacts in a browser-local directory.
Marks sensitive or raw artifacts as local-only, redacted, or otherwise not PR-safe.
